hero.title: Invoice smarter. Get paid faster.
hero.subtitle: Revora helps freelancers and agencies create invoices, track revenue, and manage recurring billing - all in one simple dashboard.
hero.trustLine: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

Landing.featuresSubheading: Clear tools, fast actions, and simple billing controls that remove admin friction from your week.

features.title: Fast Invoice Creation
features.description: Build and send invoices in minutes with a clean, guided workflow.

features.title: Revenue Visibility
features.description: Track paid, sent, draft, and overdue invoices from one dashboard.

features.title: Recurring Billing
features.description: Manage recurring billing and subscriptions without extra complexity.

features.title: Global Ready
features.description: Support international clients with currency-ready invoicing.

features.title: Secure Infrastructure
features.description: Built with modern authentication and data isolation by default.

features.title: PDF Exports
features.description: Generate professional PDFs for clients with one click.

testimonials.name: Lina K.
testimonials.quote: Revora cut my invoicing time in half and helped me get paid faster every month.

testimonials.name: Marcus D.
testimonials.quote: Clean dashboard, clear revenue tracking, and a setup my whole team adopted quickly.

testimonials.name: Sara N.
testimonials.quote: The experience feels premium and simple. It gave me confidence to charge globally.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.subheading: Start free, prove value quickly, and upgrade when your invoicing volume grows.

faq.a: Yes. Revora uses modern authentication and secure data isolation to protect every account.
Absolutely. You can upgrade or cancel your Pro subscription whenever you need.

faq.q: Do I need a credit card for Free?
faq.a: No. You can start with the Free plan immediately without entering a credit card.
Yes. Revora supports multi-currency invoicing for international clients.

finalCta.heading: Ready to simplify your invoicing?
finalCta.subheading: Start for free, send your first invoice today, and scale with recurring billing when you are ready.

footer.copy: © {year} Revora. Smart invoicing for modern businesses.
